IntuneManifest.Name: CFG-SYS-100 - Wallpaper PPPC (Privacy Preferences)
IntuneManifest.Description: Pre-authorizes the Intune agent and osascript to send Apple Events to Finder for setting the desktop wallpaper. Required to avoid TCC consent prompts when the wallpaper script (SCR-SYS-102) runs on macOS 14+ devices.
